text:
Gemini
conjunct Mars. Therefore the job will be good but will not last long as Saturn
aspects Venus and Mars from the seventh house.
At about the age of 7-8-9, the native would have lost his mother.
The native will get a job in an engineering concern (Saturn has Mars in
seventh to him conjunct Venus).
When Jupiter transits Sagittarius, the native will be married as Jupiter
gets the aspect ofVenus from Gemini. His good days start from 30-35. He
will have his own house, have one daughter and one son live upto a good old
age of70 years.
CHART 406
The bestower of life the Sun is exalted conjunct Mercury having Mars,

IMPORTANT CHARTS 265
the Moon and Venus in third to him

had five sons and daughters. As re
gards the two sisters represented by the
